title: Superflat Plus
description: Add-ons to expand & allow you obtain unobtainables from Superflat Worlds
body:
# Superflat Plus This Mod was requested by [kg_boom3r](https://www.twitch.tv/kg_boom3r) to enhance Superflat Worlds. It expands on vanilla possibilities to allow you obtain unobtainables from Superflat Worlds since this was a request it's made to run on 1.20.1. It may work on 1.20 as well but no promises. If you are interested in this Mod you may make a request on the [GitHub](https://github.com/A5ho9999/MinecraftMods/issues) for a certain version (Only 1.20 and above) ## Requirements - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) - For easy configuration use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) ##
# DO NOT USE WITH NORMAL WORLD INSTANCES, IT IS DESIGNED PURELY FOR SUPERFLAT WORLDS
## Features ### Game Changes - Shear any Sapling to obtain Dead Bush - Breed Polar Bears with any Fish (Does not make them friendly) - Breed Parrots with Seeds - Breed Axolotls with Tropical Fish & Bucketed Fish - Randomized Frog Variants, no longer biome dependent (This logic assumes the spawned Frog is a Temperate Variant originally) - Randomized Wolf Variants, no longer biome dependent - Break Frosted Ice (Ice generated from Frost Walker) with Silk Touch to obtain Normal Ice Blocks - Break Coral Blocks with Fortune to obtain Coral & Coral Fans - When Flowing Lava touches Flowing Water (Cobbblestone Generation) in The End it will become Deepslate instead of Cobblestone - Added ability to compost Poisonous Potatoes ### Major Changes - Overrides the Superflat world preset to allow for more stuctures to be generated. (Lava Lakes, Ruined Portals, Pillager Outposts & Mineshafts) - Added all Flowers (besides Wither Rose) to Moss when bonemealed (Compatible with most Moss Farms/Now also a Flower Farm) - Lowered Plains Biome Temperature, it will now snow at around Y290, leaving Snow Layers and Freezing water at those heights - Allows Squid to be bucketed - Adds New Item, Bucket of Squid - Adjusted Spawns Biomes - Rabbits, Squids, Dolphins & Mooshrooms can now spawn in Plains Biome (Using their respected spawn requirements) - Removed Spawn Height restriction from Water Creatures (Allows Squids & Dolphins to spawn on default Superflat worlds without building up) - The Sea Height can be changed with a new GameRule allowing Water Creatures to spawn below a given Y Value - `waterCreatureSpawnSeaHeight` [Default: 35] - The Sea Depth can be changed with a new GameRule allowing Water Creatures to spawn above a given Y Value - `waterCreatureSpawnSeaDepth` [Default: Y-64] - Added Wolves to Spawn in Villages like Cats - Changed End Generation - Amethyst Geodes and Ancient Cities now generate in the End - More Bonemeal Usages - Adds ability to Bonemeal most Plant Blocks - Current List: Cactus, Chorus Fruit, Sugarcane, Coral, Coral Fans, Hanging Roots, Nether Sprouts/Roots, Leaves, Lily-pads, Spore Blossoms, Vines & Nether-wart - Bonemeal Grass, Podzol & Mycelium to spread it by 1 block (1 in each direction, can only spread to Dirt) ### New Crafting Recipes - Craft Glow Lichen with Vines & Glow Ink Sac (Surround a vine with the glow ink sacs in a crafting table) - Craft Ice with 4 Blocks of Snow - Craft Powdered Snow Bucket with Blocks of Snow & An Empty Bucket (Surround a bucket with Snow Blocks in Crafting Table) - Sherd Duplication Recipes, Using Bricks, Terracotta & A Sherd - Craft Coral Blocks with 2 Coral & 2 Coral Fans - Craft Glided Blackstone with 8 Gold Nuggets & 1 Blackstone - Craft Mud with 4 Dirt & 1 Water Bucket ### New Trade Offers - Adjusted Villager Traders - Masons now sell Tuff, Calcite, Deepslate, Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks & Dark Prismarine - Fishermen now sell Bucket of Salmon, Bucket of Tadpole, Bucket of Squid, Heart of the Sea, Sea Lanterns & Sponges - Weapon-smiths now sell Tridents - Adjusted Wandering Trader Offers - Added Bucket of Axolotl (All Variants) - Added Mycelium, Spore Blossoms, Sweet Berries, Coco Beans & All 2 Tall Flowers ### New Loot-tables - Adjusted Drowned Loot-tables - Copper Increased from 11% to 25% (No longer requires Player Kill) - Adjusted Fishing Loot-tables - Ink Sacs increase from 1% to 35% - Tropical Fish increased 2% to 50% - Cod decreased from 60% to 25% - Bamboo biome requirement removed - Adjusted Chest Loot-tables - Adds Pottery Sherds & Bamboo to Pillager Outpost Chests (75% chance to get any Sherd) - Adds Pottery Sherds to Ancient City Chests (25% chance to get any Sherd) - Adds Relic, Mellohi & Wait Music Disc to Ancient City Chests (1% Chance) - Adds All Smithing Trim Templates to End City Chests (75% chance to get any Template) - Adds Turtle, Sniffer, Polar Bear, Panda, Ocelot, Parrot, Goat & Fox Eggs to Village Blacksmith Chests & Ruined Portal Chests - Adjusted Mineshaft Loot-tables - 25% Chance for Coal Ore, 5% Chance for Deepslate Coal Ore - 25% Chance for Iron Ore, 10% Chance for Deepslate Iron Ore - 25% Chance for Copper Ore, 10% Chance for Deepslate Copper Ore - 5% Chance for Redstone Ore, 15% Chance for Deepslate Redstone Ore - 15% Chance for Gold Ore, 10% Chance for Deepslate Gold Ore - 10% Chance for Lapis Ore, 15% Chance for Deepslate Lapis Ore - 8% Chance for Emerald Ore, 2% Chance for Deepslate Emerald Ore - 2% Chance for Diamond Ore, 8% Chance for Deepslate Diamond Ore ### Mod Add-ons - [Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/things) - 8% Chance for Gleaming Ore, 2% Chance for Deepslate Gleaming Ore in Ancient City Chests
